task.title: Verify Installation
task.shortdesc: Validate CLI behavior, plugin registry loading, and a full dry-run pipeline before you process production packages.

prereq.p: Activate the virtual environment where you installed the package.
For first-time onboarding, use a small package to inspect every generated artifact before running larger migrations.

step.cmd: Check the installed version and top-level command list.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor plugin list python3 -m dita_package_processor plugin info dita_package_processor.core

step.cmd: Run a smoke-test pipeline in dry-run mode on a small package.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor run \ --package /path/to/small-package \ --docx-stem SmokeDoc \ --target build/smoke \ --report build/smoke/execution-report.json

step.cmd: Inspect the report summary and discovery counts.

result.p: You confirmed that command routing, plugin loading, planning, and execution reporting work in your environment.
